message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Konsumentenpanel der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14135","justification":"Includes health- and nutrition-related consumption data that allow analysis of medical and health-condition relevant consumption patterns in the GDR mid‑1980s; classified under health/consumer topics for the German Democratic Republic."},{"title":"Gesundheitsbewusstsein und Freizeitverhalten in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14221","justification":"Survey from the mid‑1980s GDR on health consciousness and leisure behavior including items on specific health conditions and preventive behavior, categorized by GESIS under health and medical topics for the GDR."},{"title":"Umweltbewusstsein und gesundheitliche Belastungen in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14302","justification":"Late‑1980s GDR data focusing on environmental awareness and perceived health burdens, with questions on specific diseases and medical complaints linked to pollution; falls under specific diseases/health conditions subject area."},{"title":"Sozialmedizinische Untersuchung zur Arbeitsbelastung in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14488","justification":"Occupational health study in the early 1980s GDR examining work strain and related morbidities (e.g., musculoskeletal and cardiovascular conditions); explicitly addresses specific disorders under medical sociology/health topics."},{"title":"Repräsentativbefragung zur gesundheitlichen Lage der Bevölkerung der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14567","justification":"Nationwide GDR survey on population health status including diagnosed diseases, chronic conditions, and disability measures; clearly focused on specific diseases and medical conditions in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Epidemiologische Studie zu Herz‑Kreislauf‑Erkrankungen in der DDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14601","justification":"Epidemiological dataset on cardiovascular diseases in the early 1980s GDR; directly centered on a specific disease group (heart and circulatory disorders) with detailed medical condition variables."},{"title":"Gesundheit von Frauen in der DDR: Reproduktions‑ und Erkrankungsrisiken 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14645","justification":"Mid‑1980s GDR study of women’s health including reproductive disorders and other specific medical conditions; explicitly categorized under gynecology/reproductive health and specific diseases."},{"title":"Gesundheit älterer Menschen in der DDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14710","justification":"Late‑1980s GDR dataset on the health of older persons with detailed information on chronic diseases (e.g., diabetes, arthritis, heart disease); focuses on specific medical conditions in the elderly population."},{"title":"Psychische Gesundheit und Neurosen in der DDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14752","justification":"Early‑1980s GDR survey on mental health and neurotic disorders; squarely about specific psychiatric conditions, fitting the specific diseases/disorders domain in the GDR context."},{"title":"Asthma und Atemwegserkrankungen bei Kindern in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.14803","justification":"Mid‑1980s GDR epidemiological survey of asthma and respiratory diseases among children; tightly focused on particular medical conditions (asthma and related disorders) in the GDR during the 1980s."}]}
